aws.name: ECR images scanned for vulnerabilities
aws.expected: All ECR images have vulnerability scan results
aws.remediation: Enable automated vulnerability scanning for all ECR repositories.

aws.name: Inspector scans for software bill of materials
aws.expected: Inspector enabled to generate SBOM for EC2 and ECR resources
aws.remediation: Enable Amazon Inspector for SBOM generation and vulnerability management.

azure.name: Container Registry images scanned
azure.expected: Container registries have Defender for Containers enabled for scanning
azure.remediation: Enable Microsoft Defender for Containers on Azure Container Registry.

gcp.name: Artifact Registry images scanned
gcp.expected: Container images have vulnerability scanning enabled
gcp.remediation: Enable Container Analysis for vulnerability scanning on Artifact Registry.

aws.name: CodeBuild includes dependency scanning
aws.expected: CodeBuild projects include dependency vulnerability scanning
aws.remediation: Add dependency scanning tools to CodeBuild project specifications.

azure.name: Azure Pipelines include dependency scanning
azure.expected: Pipelines include dependency vulnerability scanning tasks
azure.remediation: Add dependency scanning to Azure Pipeline definitions.

gcp.name: Cloud Build includes dependency scanning
gcp.expected: Cloud Build includes dependency vulnerability scanning steps
gcp.remediation: Add dependency scanning steps to Cloud Build configurations.

aws.name: ECR images signed with AWS Signer
aws.expected: Container images signed for authenticity verification
aws.remediation: Use AWS Signer to sign container images and verify signatures at deployment.

aws.name: Lambda code signing configured
aws.expected: Lambda functions use code signing configurations
aws.remediation: Configure code signing for Lambda functions to ensure authenticity.

azure.name: Container Registry content trust enabled
azure.expected: Container registries have content trust enabled for image signing
azure.remediation: Enable content trust on Azure Container Registry for image signing.

gcp.name: Binary Authorization enforced
gcp.expected: Binary Authorization policy requires signed images
gcp.remediation: Enable Binary Authorization to require signed container images.
